methodology.clsa: Raw monthly chart.data index from CLSA Feng Shui Index JS files.
methodology.augar: AUGAR six-engine composite for each future period, generated with HSI history available as of the first CLSA point end date.
methodology.price: Actual HSI close nearest to or before each CLSA period end date; future points are null when local data is unavailable.

augar.headline: HSI 2020 six-engine monthly composite
augar.summary: Based on the six-engine composite scoring system, the Hang Seng Index in 2020 shows a pattern of initial weakness, mid-year volatility, and year-end recovery. Early months are pressured by pandemic impact and falling momentum; mid-year sees mixed signals and increased volatility; late year scores improve as market sentiment repairs and favorable cycles emerge.
augar.summary_zh: 基于六引擎复合评分系统，2020年恒生指数整体呈现先抑后扬的走势。年初受疫情冲击和下跌动能影响，评分偏低；年中多空交织，震荡加剧；年末随着市场情绪修复和有利周期到来，评分回升。
augar.summary_en: Based on the six-engine composite scoring system, the Hang Seng Index in 2020 shows a pattern of initial weakness, mid-year volatility, and year-end recovery. Early months are pressured by pandemic impact and falling momentum; mid-year sees mixed signals and increased volatility; late year scores improve as market sentiment repairs and favorable cycles emerge.

augar.headline: HSI 2022 six-engine monthly composite
augar.summary: Based on the six-engine composite scoring (Tarot, Wenwang, Bazi, Ziwei, Astrology, Market Pulse), the Hang Seng Index in 2022 shows a generally weak bias with most monthly scores below 50. The year starts with a relatively high score in January but quickly declines, with the lowest scores in March, September, and October, indicating significant downside risks. The score recovers to a neutral-bullish level in December, suggesting a potential rebound.
augar.summary_zh: 基于六引擎（塔罗、文王、八字、紫微、占星、市场脉动）的复合评分，2022年恒生指数全年多数月份评分在50以下，显示市场整体偏向弱势。年初1月评分较高，但随后快速回落，3月、9月、10月评分最低，预示显著下行风险。年末12月评分回升至中性偏多，可能为阶段性反弹。
augar.summary_en: Based on the six-engine composite scoring (Tarot, Wenwang, Bazi, Ziwei, Astrology, Market Pulse), the Hang Seng Index in 2022 shows a generally weak bias with most monthly scores below 50. The year starts with a relatively high score in January but quickly declines, with the lowest scores in March, September, and October, indicating significant downside risks. The score recovers to a neutral-bullish level in December, suggesting a potential rebound.

augar.headline: HSI 2024 six-engine monthly composite
augar.summary: Based on the six-engine composite scoring, the Hang Seng Index in 2024 shows a pattern of early-year pressure, mid-year volatility, and a potential stabilization towards year-end. Early scores are low due to strong downtrend and bearish factors; mid-year sees mixed signals and increased volatility; late-year scores gradually improve as market sentiment and positive indicators emerge. Key factors include policy changes, geopolitical risks, and capital flows.
augar.summary_zh: 基于六引擎综合评分，2024年恒生指数整体呈现前低后高走势。年初受强下行趋势和利空因素影响，评分偏低；年中多空交织，震荡加剧；年末随着市场情绪改善和积极信号增多，评分逐步回升。全年需关注政策面、地缘风险及资金流向变化。
augar.summary_en: Based on the six-engine composite scoring, the Hang Seng Index in 2024 shows a pattern of early-year pressure, mid-year volatility, and a potential stabilization towards year-end. Early scores are low due to strong downtrend and bearish factors; mid-year sees mixed signals and increased volatility; late-year scores gradually improve as market sentiment and positive indicators emerge. Key factors include policy changes, geopolitical risks, and capital flows.

augar.headline: HSI 2025 six-engine monthly composite
augar.summary: Based on the six-engine composite scoring, the Hang Seng Index shows a low-to-high trajectory in 2025. Early months are constrained by sentiment repair and liquidity pressure, with neutral-to-weak scores. From Q2 onward, improved policy expectations and capital inflows lift scores gradually. In H2, technical support and cyclical resonance push scores into a moderately bullish range. Key risks include geopolitical tensions and inflation volatility.
augar.summary_zh: 基于六引擎复合评分，恒生指数2025年整体呈现前低后高走势。年初受制于市场情绪修复和流动性压力，评分中性偏弱；二季度后随着政策预期改善和资金回流，评分逐步回升；下半年在技术面支撑和周期共振下，评分进入偏强区间。全年需关注地缘风险和通胀反复带来的波动。
augar.summary_en: Based on the six-engine composite scoring, the Hang Seng Index shows a low-to-high trajectory in 2025. Early months are constrained by sentiment repair and liquidity pressure, with neutral-to-weak scores. From Q2 onward, improved policy expectations and capital inflows lift scores gradually. In H2, technical support and cyclical resonance push scores into a moderately bullish range. Key risks include geopolitical tensions and inflation volatility.

augar.headline: HSI 2026 six-engine monthly composite
augar.summary: Based on the six-engine composite scoring, the Hang Seng Index in 2026 shows a pattern of early strength, mid-year volatility, and a moderate recovery towards year-end. Early months are supported by upward momentum and positive signals, yielding higher scores. Mid-year sees increased divergence among engines and market volatility, with scores declining. Late year sees a moderate recovery as some engines turn more favorable. Focus on external risks and internal structural adjustments throughout the year.
augar.summary_zh: 基于六引擎复合评分，2026年恒生指数整体呈现前高后低再回升的走势。年初受上升动能和积极信号支撑，评分较高；年中多引擎出现分歧，市场波动加大，评分回落；年末部分引擎转暖，评分温和回升。全年需关注外部风险与内部结构性调整。
augar.summary_en: Based on the six-engine composite scoring, the Hang Seng Index in 2026 shows a pattern of early strength, mid-year volatility, and a moderate recovery towards year-end. Early months are supported by upward momentum and positive signals, yielding higher scores. Mid-year sees increased divergence among engines and market volatility, with scores declining. Late year sees a moderate recovery as some engines turn more favorable. Focus on external risks and internal structural adjustments throughout the year.
